author: jih2nn
content:
[FOCIL breakout #37](https://github.com/ethereum/pm/issues/2142) <t:1782824400:R>! We can discuss:

- Client development
- Spec changes

We can discuss [engine APIs](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/609), adding IL bitlist back, `payload_attributes` event and so on.

Please feel free to add more agenda, if any. Let's talk soon!

Meeting: https://ethereumfoundation.zoom.us/j/86906179459?pwd=HYRb1g5qo5QLa4XVmfqiKknWpiwIZU.1
